untranslatable_reason: Entry conditions require qualitative assessment of 'material early warnings' (guidance cut, analyst downgrade, technician breakdown, insider selling acceleration) and position sizing logic (2-3% of portfolio max loss). These fundamental/sentiment signals and portfolio-relative position sizing cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The 52-week high proximity is approximated using price_pos_20 (20-day position), which is the closest available indicator but does not directly measure 52-week distance.
translation_notes: Translated contrarian short entry near highs using price_pos_20 > 0.90 (price in upper 90th percentile of 20-day range, a proxy for near-high positioning). Stop loss set at +12% (0.12 in decimal scale per scale notes). Exit conditions use returns indicator: positive returns > 12% for stop loss breach, and negative returns < -25% for profit target (25% gain on short = -0.25 return). Original signal requires fundamental/sentiment data unavailable in technical indicator set. Target regimes mapped from 'TRENDING, ANY' to allowed regime set.
